rationale: Update self-modify payload to explicitly prefer file-based payloads to reduce Windows CLI arg-length risk while keeping scope unchanged.

edits.content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.self_modify_payload.v1",
  "t": 1773150366,
  "goal": "Improve BrainFlow execution success: reduce LLM JSON parse failures; ensure doer-mode; make workflow robust and self-improving. Prefer file-based payloads to reduce Windows CLI arg-length risk.",
  "allowlist": [
    "workflows/*.yaml",
    "plugins/**/*.py",
    "core/**/*.py",
    "memory/procedural/*.json"
  ],
  "signals": {
    "last_scorecard_overall": 75,
    "last_scorecard_pass": true,
    "last_scorecard_notes": "heuristic_fallback_llm_eval_failed",
    "last_scorecard_evidence": [
      "pending_n=18",
      "repeatCount~0",
      "executed_n=3"
    ]
  },
  "output_schema": {
    "schema": "brainflow.change_set.v2",
    "keys": [
      "schema",
      "t",
      "rationale",
      "edits",
      "risks",
      "expected_benefit"
    ],
    "constraints": {
      "max_files": 1,
      "full_file_replacement": true
    }
  },
  "cli_arg_strategy": "use_file"
}

risks: Low: adds a new hint field; downstream consumers that ignore unknown fields are unaffected.
expected_benefit: Reduces likelihood of Windows CLI arg-length issues by signaling file-based payload preference.
